notes: Salesforce 'Stage changed' notification bot — posts when an opportunity moves between stages. Use this named bot when the workspace roster has a dedicated 'Stage changed' bot. Serialize an example's `blocks` array into an action's `text` field. The Closed Lost variant carries a Loss Reason section — ideal opening card for a deal post-mortem channel.

examples.name: stage_changed_closed_lost
examples.when: An opportunity moves to Closed Lost — opening card of a deal post-mortem channel; includes a Loss Reason.

text.text: *Loss Reason:* Lost to incumbent on price (~6% gap) plus existing supplier qualification on the customer's lines. Switching cost decisive.

elements.text: Close date 2025-11-10 · Product: Widget A · Account: Acme Corp

examples.name: stage_changed_advanced
examples.when: An open opportunity advances to a later stage (e.g. Negotiation/Review).
